sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'
import { Container } from '@mui/system'
import { CardContent, Card, Grid, Typography, CardActions, Button } from '@mui/material';
import appTheme from '../theme';

const Filter = () => {

  return (
        <>
           <Container fluid="true">
            <Grid ml="auto" mr="auto" mb="6rem" container spacing={0}>
              <Grid item xs={6} sm={4} md={3} lg={2} container alignItems="center" justifyContent="center">
                <Card sx={{ minWidth: 120, minHeight: 120, mr: '10px', backgroundColor: appTheme.palette.primary.main, height: '100%'  }}>
                  <CardActions sx={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center'}}>
                    <Button size="small" sx={{ color: appTheme.palette.primary.contrastText, textTransform: 'capitalize', fontSize: '18px', lineHeight: '24px' }}>Ciencia Ficción</Button>
                  </CardActions>
                </Card>
              </Grid>
            </Grid>
          </Container>
        </>
  )
}

export default Filter
